content:
Thunderbird for Android doesn't have the functionality to create folders. As a workaround, you can create any desired folders using your providers webmail.

If your TBA account is using Imap, new folders will be displayed after refreshing the folder list. To do this ...

  1. Open the account side bar
  2. Tap your account to show Inbox, outbox etc.
  3. Tap manage folders (bottom of list).
  4. Tap 3dot menu (top right of screen).
  5. Tap refresh folder list.

The functionality to create folders within the app has been requested by the community on Mozilla connect and is open to votes. Please consider adding your support.

Ideas with high vote counts have a greater chance of being prioritised for development.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/add-the-ability-to-create-imap-folders/idi-p/72777
creator: platform34

content:
Hi Ines

Are you trying to setup gmail in TBA for the first time, or was it working before and now stopped?

Are you using Outh authentication? Normally your directed to googles sign-in page to grant the app permission to access your account. Are you seeing the network error after completing the sign-in process?

I've attached a screen shot of the SMTP settings from my working gmail. You can compare this with your settings found under settings > account > sending mail > outgoing server.

Do the Imap settings connect and authenticate successfully?

If your using any VPN, Antivirus or security apps on your phone, try disabling these. Do you have the same issue on wifi and cellular internet connection?
creator: platform34

content:
There's no setting within the app to limit the number of connections.

If your question relates to connections established to maintain a folders push notifications, you can find relevant settings under settings > account > fetching mail > advanced.

  • Max folders to check with push
  • Refresh idle connection

A server connection is maintained for each folder the push service is enabled on. Reducing the number of push enabled folders or limiting the max number allowed may help reduce the connections.
creator: platform34
